name: seo-echo-mcp
description: Voice-preserving SEO content MCP server for Claude Code, Cursor & Desktop. 14 rule-based tools, language-agnostic, no external LLM calls.

tools.name: analyze_site
tools.description: Crawl a blog and extract language, topics, style profile, H2 patterns.

tools.name: analyze_competitors
tools.description: Fetch top SERP results (DuckDuckGo → Bing fallback) and extract structure.

tools.name: detect_content_gaps
tools.description: Topics competitors cover but the site doesn't.

tools.name: check_duplicates
tools.description: Jaccard-based overlap warning against existing posts.

tools.name: suggest_titles
tools.description: 10 SEO title candidates ranked by site voice + competitor format.

tools.name: generate_outline
tools.description: SEO outline matched to your voice + competitor H2 topics.

tools.name: prepare_draft_skeleton
tools.description: Full markdown skeleton with frontmatter + <!-- WRITE --> directives per section.

tools.name: audit_content
tools.description: Scores a draft against style profile + 16 SEO checks.

tools.name: readability_report
tools.description: Per-language readability (Flesch-EN, Ateşman-TR, Fernández-Huerta-ES) + passive voice.

tools.name: suggest_image_alts
tools.description: Flags missing/weak alt text and proposes replacements.
